dimensions.label: Value
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No content exists to evaluate - all slots and banks are empty.
what_to_strengthen: Write a transformation statement that names the before/after your audience experiences
Define your core method with 3-5 named steps
Add at least one teaching framework with a name, components, and explanation of why it works

dimensions.label: Authority
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No content exists to evaluate - all slots and banks are empty.
what_to_strengthen: Add your proof intro with specific dollar amounts, dates, or measurable outcomes
Log at least 3 wins with concrete numbers and named results
Add proof points that tie your wins to a coherent authority narrative

dimensions.label: Point of View
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: The sole POV entry is the bundled example/placeholder template, not real content.
what_to_strengthen: Replace the example POV with a real belief flip: name the common belief, your counter-belief, and why
Fill at least one pov_flip slot with a genuinely contrarian stance backed by your experience
Add a named enemy or named counter-framework that makes your position concrete

dimensions.label: Connection
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No content exists to evaluate - all slots and banks are empty.
what_to_strengthen: Write your origin story with specific moments, places, and emotional beats
Add 3-5 micro-stories with sensory detail and proper nouns
Map which stories mirror which audience pain points
